title: Legendary Gloves applies Hit Atk and SPD plus six while equipped

plan.title: Legendary Gloves applies Hit Atk and SPD plus six while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Legendary Gloves to a modifier-zero primary creature, verify SPD gains +6, and run a battle to verify Hit and Atk.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so Hit and Atk bonuses come only from Legendary Gloves.

steps: Player 1 plays Legendary Gloves and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect the resolved hit roll modifier and damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +6 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm all three bonuses apply only while Legendary Gloves remains equipped.
riskNotes: Uses effective stat output for SPD and battle output for Hit/Atk.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Legendary Gloves equipped stat suite.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
